commands.review_summary:
The PR requires manage-capable access for heartbeat and Tailscale lease metadata writes, adds Worker regression coverage, and moves multiple sync archive creators to a shared Go tar/gzip helper.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main allows readable shared users through the heartbeat and Tailscale write routes without a manage check, and the PR adds a focused regression test for the `use` viewer case. I did not execute tests because this cleanup review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof, removal of the release-owned changelog edit, and maintainer acceptance of the compatibility change; automation cannot prove the contributor's real setup.
